title: Bergen, Vestland — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Bergen, Vestland: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Bergen is a city in Vestland with a population of 283,000. The gateway to the fjords, a colorful Hanseatic city surrounded by seven mountains, known for its rain and fish market.

Last updated: July 14, 2026
